name: tag
title: Tag
description: Semantic label with intent coloring, removable chip, pressable filter-chip mode, and icon support.

consumption.typeImport: import type { TagProps, TagIntent, TagContrast, TagElevation, TagSize } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Tag. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
